THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_BURN_THE_MOUNTAI: Your cards are Exhausted when played. Add a random card from a different character into hand.

THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_FIND_SOMEONE_TO_: Whenever you play the same card again, add a [gold]Human[/gold] to your hand.
Whenever the owner plays a 0-cost card, bounce {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} times off a random enemy. Removed at end of turn.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_COUPLING_POWER.d: Whenever you [blue]Evoke[/blue] an orb, trigger the passive of all remaining orbs {Amount} times.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_PRESS_FORWARD_PO: Upgrade your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]. Whenever [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is in your hand, you must [gold]play[/gold] it first.
This turn, you can only play the highest-cost card.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_VAKUU_TEACHES_U_: If you play cards from left to right, [gold]retain[/gold] all your [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]hand[/gold] this turn.
